entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 80
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST 5 TO 10 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
